Council Giving Dashboard

Blackbaud gift records · online web forms · recurring pledges
Last updated 2026-06-02
Blackbaud 2016–2026 · 3 sources
to
Blackbaud Web Recurring
Sources overlap — don't add them. Blackbaud is the authoritative gift record (2016–2026). Web and Recurring reach back further, but inside the Blackbaud years those gifts are already counted in Blackbaud. The year filter above drives every Blackbaud view; the source-by-year chart below always shows the full picture.

101Giving by source, by year

Each source side by side — never summed. Shaded years (before 2016) have no Blackbaud report, so only online/recurring giving is visible. 2026 recurring is the projected full-year run-rate from current active pledges (matching the Projections tab); other 2026 bars are year-to-date.

102Year-over-year giving

Total Blackbaud giving per year with growth % labels. 2026 is partial (through May).

Coverage map

Which source covers which years, and where they overlap.

201Giving over time

Selected sources side by side — never summed (they overlap). Web has annual + monthly; recurring is annual only.

202Cumulative giving

Running total per source across the range. Recurring is spread evenly across each year (monthly pledges).

Channel detail

401New vs. returning donors

A donor is "new" the first year they appear in the data; "returning" if they gave in an earlier year.

402Unique donors per year

403Gift-size distribution

How giving splits between grassroots gifts and major gifts.

Top donors

By total giving in the selected range (by constituent Lookup ID).

Distance tiers are great-circle miles from the council HQ ZIP 90807 (Long Beach), computed from ZIP-code centroids.

501Giving by distance from HQ

503Top ZIP codes

Where the dollars come from, by 5-digit ZIP.

Web Online form donations 2015–2026 (full history, independent of the Blackbaud year filter). From 2016 on, these also appear inside Blackbaud — treat as the online channel detail, not money on top.

601Online donations by year

Online donation dollars by year (event tickets & item purchases excluded).

602Monthly online volume

Donation dollars collected through online forms, by month.

603Online gift frequency

One-time vs. recurring online gifts.

Recurring 66 active recurring pledges (61 monthly + 5 yearly) — about $15.6K/yr committed. Bars show actual collected per year from all pledges (these also flow into Blackbaud in overlapping years).

604Recurring collections by year

Dollars collected from recurring pledges each year.

606Recurring transactions by year

Count of recurring gift transactions collected each year.

605Pledge frequency

The recurring base

Projections are estimates, not promises. 2026 is projected by pacing year-to-date against prior years (pick the 2026 basis below); 2027 from the recent annual trend. Recurring uses its active-pledge run-rate. Giving is lumpy — ranges are wide, so stress-test with the toggles.
Exclude Capital & Endowment (operating baseline)

701Blackbaud giving — actual & projected

Solid = actual. 2026 adds a projected remainder (lighter); 2027 is fully projected. Hover for the low–high range.

702Web donations — actual & projected

703Recurring — actual & projected

7042026 pace vs prior years (Blackbaud)

Cumulative giving by month. Faint lines are past years; the bold navy line is 2026 so far, dashed red to the projected year-end.
